info.name: DeliverEats API
info.description: DeliverEats API: Auth – Admin (cookies), Auth – Customer (/auth/customer, phone OTP, Bearer {{accessToken}}), Auth – Vendor (/auth/vendor, phone OTP, Bearer {{vendorAccessToken}}), Vendor – Onboarding (/vendor/onboarding, Bearer {{vendorAccessToken}}), Vendor – Products (Phase 4: /vendor/categories, /vendor/products), Admin, App (customer/driver), Payment. Set baseUrl. Variables: accessToken, refreshToken, vendorAccessToken, vendorRefreshToken, userId, customerId, vendorId, categoryId, categorySlug, itemId, productId, driverId, orderId, transactionId, paymentReference. OpenAPI: GET {{baseUrl}}/api/openapi.json. Swagger: {{baseUrl}}/api-docs.

request.description: Machine-readable list of all routes (method, path, auth, description).
OpenAPI 3.0 JSON for Swagger UI, Postman import, or codegen.

item.name: Auth – Admin (cookies)
item.description: Admin dashboard: login (email+password sets cookies), refresh, logout. Use cookies for all Admin – * requests.

item.name: Auth – Customer
item.description: Customer app: phone-only auth under /api/v1/auth/customer. Send OTP (5/hour per phone), verify OTP (returns user, accessToken, refreshToken), resend, refresh, logout. Use Bearer {{accessToken}} for app/customer routes.

request.description: Send OTP to phone. Rate limit 5/hour per phone. In dev response includes otp (e.g. 1234).
Verify OTP. Returns user { _id, fullName, phone, profileImage }, accessToken, refreshToken, expiresIn. In dev use otp 1234.
Resend OTP. Same rate limit 5/hour per phone.

item.name: Auth – Vendor
item.description: Vendor app: phone-only auth under /api/v1/auth/vendor. Send OTP (5/hour per phone), verify OTP (returns accessToken, refreshToken, isNewVendor, onboardingStep), resend, refresh, logout (Bearer + optional refreshToken/fcmToken in body).

request.description: Send OTP to phone. Rate limit 5/hour per phone. In dev OTP is logged to console. Returns maskedPhone.
Verify OTP. Returns accessToken, refreshToken, isNewVendor, onboardingStep. In dev use OTP 1234 if NODE_ENV=development (or use OTP from send-otp response).
Resend OTP. Same rate limit 5/hour per phone. 429 returns waitMinutes.
Refresh tokens. Body: refreshToken from verify-otp. Returns new accessToken, refreshToken, expiresIn.
Logout. Requires Bearer token. Optional body: refreshToken (invalidate), fcmToken (remove from vendor.fcmTokens).

item.name: Auth – Driver
item.description: Driver app: phone-only auth under /api/v1/auth/driver. Send OTP (5/hour per phone), verify OTP (returns accessToken, refreshToken, isNewDriver, approvalStatus), resend, refresh, logout (Bearer required; optional body: refreshToken, fcmToken).

request.description: Send OTP to phone. Rate limit 5/hour per phone. In dev OTP is logged to console and returned as `otp`. Otherwise returns `maskedPhone`.
Verify OTP. Returns accessToken, refreshToken, isNewDriver, approvalStatus. In dev use otp 1234.
Resend OTP. Same rate limit 5/hour per phone. 429 returns waitMinutes. In dev returns `otp`.
Refresh tokens. Body: refreshToken from verify-otp. Returns new accessToken, refreshToken, expiresIn.
Logout. Requires Bearer token. Optional body: refreshToken (invalidate), fcmToken (remove from driver.fcmTokens).

item.name: Driver – Setup
item.description: Driver profile setup flow under /api/v1/driver/setup. Requires Bearer {{accessToken}}. Step 1: profile-info (multipart). Step 2: vehicle-info (JSON).

item.name: PATCH profile-info (Step 1)
item.description: Multipart/form-data. `name` required. `phone` optional. `profileImage` optional (max 2MB, image/*).

item.name: PATCH vehicle-info (Step 2)
item.description: JSON body. Requires setupStep >= 1. `vehicleType`: bike|car|scooter|bicycle. `vehicleNumber`: trimmed + uppercased.

item.name: Driver – KYC
item.description:
Driver identity verification: GET /api/v1/driver/kyc/status, POST /upload (multipart), PATCH /resubmit. Bearer {{accessToken}} (driver JWT).

**Realtime (Socket.IO):**
- After successful POST upload, server emits `driver:kyc_submitted` to room `admin` with `{ driverId, name, phone, submittedAt }` (ISO). Admin UI shows a toast.
- Admin PATCH approve/reject can emit `driver:kyc_approved` / `driver:kyc_rejected` to room `driver:{driverId}`. Driver app must `emit('driver:join', { driverId })` after connect.

**Upload:** field `driversLicense` ×1; repeat field name `nationalId` and `vehiclePhotos` for multiple files (jpg/png/pdf, 5MB each). On 422, body may include `data.missing`: driversLicense | nationalId | vehiclePhotos.

request.description: 200: `{ success, data: { kycStatus, kycRejectionReason, kycSubmittedAt, kycDocuments: { driversLicense, nationalId[], vehiclePhotos[] } } }`. Use on app launch for routing (not_submitted | pending | approved | rejected).

formdata.description: At least one; add more rows with key nationalId
Optional 2nd national ID file — enable and choose file
Optional 2nd vehicle file — enable and choose file

request.description: 200: `{ success, data: { message, kycStatus: 'pending', kycSubmittedAt } }`. Emits `driver:kyc_submitted` to admin. 413: file too large. 422: wrong MIME or missing groups (`data.missing`).

Only when kycStatus === rejected. 200: `{ success, data: { kycStatus: 'not_submitted' } }`. Clears kycRejectionReason. Driver app should open document upload with **empty** file selections (no request body).

item.name: Driver – Profile
item.description: Driver self-service profile management under /api/v1/driver/profile. Requires Bearer {{accessToken}} (Driver auth).

item.name: PATCH my profile (multipart)
item.description: All fields optional: name, phone, profileImage (max 2MB), vehicleType, vehicleNumber.

item.name: PATCH online/offline status
item.description: Guard: approvalStatus must be approved to go online.

item.name: Vendor – Onboarding
item.description: Vendor app onboarding (Bearer {{vendorAccessToken}}). GET status; PATCH business-info (Step 2: multipart — storeName required; optional description, operatingHours JSON, logo — no storeType), address (Step 3), contact (Step 4); POST kyc-documents (Step 5), submit (Step 6). All steps idempotent.

item.name: PATCH business-info (Step 2)
item.description: Multipart body: `storeName` (required). Optional: `description`, `operatingHours` (JSON string), `logo` (file). Do not send `storeType` — it was removed from the API.

request.description: Submit application. 422 if steps 2–5 not complete; emits vendor:new_submission to admin room and FCM to admins.

item.name: Vendor – Products
item.description: Phase 4: Product management. Requires vendor Bearer (authVendor + requireApproved). Store must be approved. Set productId from list/get. Multipart for create/update.

request.description: Categories for vendor store type (from categoryIds). Returns _id, name, slug, icon, sortOrder.
403 if product belongs to another vendor.
Multipart. Emits product:created to admin room.
Flips isAvailable. Emits product:toggled to admin when set to false.
Soft delete (isDeleted: true). Returns 204. Emits product:deleted to admin.

item.name: Vendor – Orders
item.description: Vendor order management. Bearer {{vendorAccessToken}}. authVendor + requireApproved.

query.description: pending | confirmed | preparing | ready | out_for_delivery | delivered | cancelled | rejected

request.description: 403 if order does not belong to this vendor.
Allowed transitions per workflow (e.g. pending -> confirmed -> preparing -> ready).
Only for pending orders.

item.name: Admin – Users
item.description: Requires admin auth (cookies from Admin login). All routes: authenticateJWT + requireRole(admin, super_admin).

formdata.description: Optional JSON: label, street, city, country

request.description: status: active | blocked. When blocking, reason (string) is required and stored in blockReason.

item.name: Admin – Customers
item.description: Customer management. Requires admin auth (cookies from Admin login). Set customerId after Get/List.

request.description: blocked: true to block, false to unblock; reason optional when blocking.

item.name: Admin – Drivers
item.description:
Driver management. Requires admin auth (cookies from Admin login).

**KYC side-effects (Socket.IO):** PATCH …/approve: if driver kycStatus was pending → sets kyc approved, emits `driver:kyc_approved` to `driver:{id}` `{ kycStatus: 'approved' }`, FCM to driver. PATCH …/reject: sets kyc rejected + `kycRejectionReason` (from optional `kycRejectionReason` or `reason`), emits `driver:kyc_rejected` with `{ kycStatus, kycRejectionReason }`, FCM. GET driver by id includes `kycStatus`, `kycRejectionReason`, `kycSubmittedAt`, `kycDocuments`.

request.description: Includes KYC fields: kycStatus, kycRejectionReason, kycSubmittedAt, kycDocuments { driversLicense, nationalId[], vehiclePhotos[] }.
Sets approvalStatus approved. If kycStatus was pending → sets KYC approved, emits Socket.IO `driver:kyc_approved` to room `driver:{driverId}`, FCM 'KYC Approved' to driver. No body.

`reason` required, min 10 chars (approvalNote). Optional `kycRejectionReason` for driver KYC text; defaults to reason. Also sets kycStatus rejected, emits Socket.IO `driver:kyc_rejected` to `driver:{driverId}` `{ kycStatus, kycRejectionReason }`, FCM to driver.
status: active | blocked. When blocking, reason is required (blockReason).

item.name: App – Customer profile
item.description: Requires customer Bearer token (from verify-otp). Set Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}. Profile uses fullName, phone, profileImage (no email).

request.description: Customer app: returns fullName, phone, profileImage, points, totalOrders only. No password/email.
Update customer profile. Body: multipart/form-data with fullName, phone, profileImage (optional) only. No email.
Body: { "fcmToken": "string" }. Updates FCM token and lastActiveAt.
Body: addressLine1, saveAddressType (home|work|other), city, country (required); addressLine2, landmark, lat, lng, isDefault (optional). Max 5 addresses.
Path: id (address _id from GET addresses). Body: addressLine1, addressLine2, landmark, saveAddressType (home|work|other), city, country, lat, lng, isDefault (all optional).
Path: id (address _id from GET addresses).

item.name: App – Cart
item.description: Customer cart. Bearer {{accessToken}}. GET includes totals: subtotal, deliveryFee, taxPercent, taxAmount, grandTotal. POST set cart, PATCH item (qty 0 = remove), DELETE clear.

request.description: Returns cart and computed totals: subtotal, deliveryFee, taxPercent, taxAmount, grandTotal.
Replaces current cart. vendorId + items with productId and qty.
Update quantity. qty 0 removes the item.

item.name: App – Products
item.description: Public product by id. No auth.

request.description: Returns product with category and vendor info. Public.

item.name: App – Customer orders
item.description: Customer order endpoints. Use Bearer {{accessToken}} from App login (customer).

request.description: Cart-based: deliveryAddress required; usePoints, deliveryInstructions optional. Or send vendorId + items + deliveryAddress for direct order.

item.name: App – Driver orders
item.description: Driver order endpoints. Use Bearer {{accessToken}} from App login (driver). Driver must be approved, active and online for available/accept.

item.name: Admin – Orders
item.description: Admin order management. Requires admin auth (cookies from Admin login).

request.description: driverId: approved active driver's _id. Returns order with populated driverId.
Same as assign-driver; alternative path PATCH /admin/orders/:id/driver.

item.name: Admin – Transactions
item.description: Admin transaction list and revenue. Requires admin auth (cookies).

item.name: Admin – Vendors
item.description: Vendor and menu-item management. Requires admin auth (cookies). Set vendorId and itemId as needed.

request.description: Phase 4: Paginated products for vendor. Query: page, limit, category, isAvailable.

item.name: Admin – Categories
item.description: Category management. Requires admin auth (cookies). Create/update use multipart (name, type, description, sortOrder, icon file). Set categoryId for by-id operations.

request.description: Returns 409 with vendors list if category is in use.

item.name: Admin – App Settings
item.description: App settings for pricing totals. Requires admin auth (cookies). Configure delivery fee and tax percent.

request.description: Returns deliveryFee and taxPercent.
Update deliveryFee (>=0) and taxPercent (0-100).

item.name: Payment
item.description: Payment: initiate (customer Bearer), status (any Bearer), refund (admin cookies). Callback is WifiPay webhook (no auth, raw body).

item.name: Payment callback (WifiPay webhook)
item.description: Called by WifiPay; raw body, no auth. Signature in x-wifipay-signature. For testing only.

item.name: App – Vendors
item.description: Public vendor listing for app. No auth required. Set vendorId for Get vendor. Query: search, category, sort, minRating, maxDeliveryTime, minPrice, maxPrice, page, limit (default 10).

request.description: Returns { data: { vendors, total, page, pages } }. Categories populated with _id, name, slug, icon.
Returns { data: { vendor, products } }. Vendor has categoryIds populated; products have category (name) populated. 404 if not found or not active.

item.name: App – Categories
item.description: Public category listing and vendors by category. No auth. Query: type (food|grocery|pharmacy|fashion|retail). Set categorySlug for Get category vendors.

query.description: Filter: food | grocery | pharmacy | fashion | retail

request.description: Returns { data: [ { _id, name, slug, icon, type, sortOrder } ] }. Only isActive and non-deleted.
Returns { data: { vendors, total, page, pages } }. 404 if category slug not found or inactive.
